name: rain-ai
description: A shareable Claude marketplace for getting set up: onboarding, system orientation, and device bootstrapping. The front door to a Claude-as-an-OS workflow.

plugins.name: start
plugins.description: System-level device setup: global/device bootstrapping such as the terminal and shared Claude settings. Per-capability setup stays in each capability's own plugin.

plugins.name: productivity
plugins.description: Portable, general-purpose productivity skills: breakout (open a fresh chat in a new tab), handoff (compact the conversation for a new agent), and grill-me (stress-test a plan by interview).
